_comment: Go-authoritative C-Chain genesis state root + block ID, captured from coreth core.Genesis.ToBlock(). See _provenance.md. Mainnet and Fuji share identical genesis state-root + block-ID: the only config difference (chainId 43114 vs 43113) is not a header field, and the alloc + all header fields are identical. Local (network-id=12345) differs in BOTH: its genesis timestamp is InitiallyActiveTime, so the warp activation account joins the state and the fork-gated header tail (baseFee/Etna/Cancun/Granite fields) is present.
